f5.streaming_notes: F5-TTS slices generated audio into chunks after synthesis; no true incremental decode.
f5.optimization_backend_reason: F5-TTS does not expose a selectable attention/acceleration backend in this probe; the measured path is controlled by synthesis chunking only.

eager.reason: F5-TTS does not expose a selectable attention/acceleration backend in this probe; the measured path is controlled by synthesis chunking only.

luxtts.optimization_backend_reason: LuxTTS probe used the upstream ZipVoice PyTorch path; the main speed knobs are prompt caching, num_steps, and CPU/ONNX runtime selection rather than selectable attention backends.

flash_attention_2.reason: LuxTTS probe used the upstream ZipVoice PyTorch path; the main speed knobs are prompt caching, num_steps, and CPU/ONNX runtime selection rather than selectable attention backends.

chatterbox_turbo.optimization_backend_reason: Chatterbox Turbo probe used the default CUDA PyTorch path; upstream generation relies on its built-in sampler configuration rather than a selectable attention backend.

tada_1b.optimization_backend_reason: TADA 1B probe used the upstream bf16/fp32 PyTorch path; acceleration comes from dtype and cached prompt encoding, not a selectable attention backend in this harness.

qwen3.streaming_notes: Qwen3-TTS non_streaming_mode=False simulates streaming text input but still returns audio after full generation.
qwen3.optimization_backend_reason: Qwen3-TTS probe measured the eager baseline because flash_attn is not available.

sdpa.reason: The current qwen_tts probe does not expose an SDPA-specific execution path.

flash_attention_2.reason: FlashAttention 2 is unavailable in the current runtime; falling back to eager attention (ModuleNotFoundError("No module named 'flash_attn'")).

v1_default_reason: No engine hit the budget; f5 has best TTFA
